analysis: The project appears to be a static website with multiple versions (test-website, github-page, docs). The current event.json specifies a theme related to black holes, with a focus on animated objects and slides. The docs directory seems to be the primary target for updates. The existing to-dos indicate incomplete CSS, HTML, and JavaScript files that need to be completed to reflect the black hole theme with animations and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including the showSlide function and mobile menu toggle functionality with proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions.
